preLaunchDescription: Show Owner Portal self-test progress and result
rollbackProcedure: Revert the release merge on main or reset the deployment source to preLaunchCommit through a reviewed pull request.
Allow GitHub Pages to redeploy the restored main commit.
Run live URL smoke tests and privacy checks after rollback.
For Owner Portal rollback, restore the archived bound-project source and redeploy the known stable deployment ID to version 9 or a verified replacement version.
